# Sulaiy Formation

**Summary**: A Lower Cretaceous carbonate unit.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] characterized the sulaiy-formation as a widespread lime mudstone to wackestone unit.
